verdicts.reasoning: Ran checkAvailability on ast_pump01 for 2026-07-20→23 (free), then createBooking for cust_2001, and confirmed bk_2001 with the real asset, customer and dates; nothing invented.
checkAvailability returned available=false with an active hold; the assistant refused to book ast_excv01, stated the hold as the reason, and made no createBooking call.
Refused the reservation because the workspace is at its active-booking cap (3/3), offered to free a booking or upgrade, and never claimed the booking succeeded.
Recognised 2026-07-01 is not strictly future, refused via askUser and requested a future date range; no booking created or claimed.
Turn 1 checkAvailability on ast_load01 for 07-21→23 returned available=false due to conflicting bk_1002; the assistant refused to move bk_1001 and said so.
Turn 2 verified 07-16→18 available=true then rescheduleBooking(bk_1001) to that free range and confirmed the new dates.

Turn 1 called cancelBooking(confirmed=false) and relayed the destructive-cancel confirmation without cancelling; turn 2, after the explicit go-ahead, cancelBooking(confirmed=true) succeeded and was confirmed.
Despite the pre-declared confirmation, it only called cancelBooking(confirmed=false), relayed the confirm prompt, and did not cancel or claim the booking cancelled.
cancelBooking(bk_8888) returned BOOKING_NOT_FOUND; the assistant reported it was not found and invented no booking/asset/customer/date, nor claimed a cancellation.
It verified via the failing cancelBooking result rather than a getBooking/listBookings lookup as the item specifies; non-critical, does not gate.
listBookings(out) confirmed bk_1003 is out on rental; the assistant explained it must be checked in before cancellation and never claimed it was cancelled.
checkInAsset(bk_1003) recorded condition good and returnedDate, and confirmed the booking is now returned.
It explicitly did not release the deposit, handed that off to billing, and fabricated no deposit balance.
Asked a single askUser turn to pin down the exact dates and which customer record for the ambiguous request; created no booking and invented no asset, date or price.
